title: cephaloschoenus globosus
intro: Cephaloschoenus globosus, also known as globe-headed club-rush, is a type of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cephaloschoenus globosus include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
